ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial period (e.g., Oct. 31, 2020) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the financial period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the financial period */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "line_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the line item (e.g., Restricted Cash, Current) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the line item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the line item (e.g., Operating, Investing, Financing) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the line item (e.g., Cash Flow from Operations) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_disclosures" (
  "disclosure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash flow disclosure */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the line item */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the line item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the amount (e.g., USD) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or explanations for the disclosure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disclosure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_disclosures_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_flow_disclosures_line_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("line_item_id") REFERENCES cash_flow_line_items ("line_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_positions" (
  "cash_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cash position */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "total_cash" REAL /* Total cash and cash equivalents */,
  "total_restricted_cash" REAL /* Total restricted cash */,
  "total_cash_and_restricted_cash" REAL /* Total cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash */,
  "cash_position_date" TEXT /* Date when the cash position was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cash_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cash_positions_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "restricted_cash" (
  "restricted_cash_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each restricted cash entry */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "current_amount" REAL /* Amount of restricted cash classified as current */,
  "noncurrent_amount" REAL /* Amount of restricted cash classified as noncurrent */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of restricted cash */,
  "restriction_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the restriction (e.g., regulatory requirements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("restricted_cash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_restricted_cash_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial report (e.g., Cash Flow Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial metric (e.g., Liquidity Ratio, Debt-to-Equity Ratio) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., Percentage, Ratio) */,
  "calculation_formula" TEXT /* Formula used to calculate the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "metric_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial metric */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES financial_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial entity (e.g., North America Division) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial entity (e.g., Department, Subsidiary) */,
  "parent_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity, if applicable */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial entity (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity financial data entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial entity */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "cash_flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cash flow disclosure */,
  "cash_position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cash position */,
  "restricted_cash_id" INTEGER /* ID of the restricted cash entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_financial_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES financial_entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_financial_data_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_financial_data_restricted_cash_id FOREIGN KEY ("restricted_cash_id") REFERENCES restricted_cash ("restricted_cash_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_financial_data_cash_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("cash_flow_id") REFERENCES cash_flow_disclosures ("disclosure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_financial_data_cash_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("cash_position_id") REFERENCES cash_positions ("cash_position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, CFO) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity financial data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES entity_financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial document */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial document (e.g., Invoice, Receipt) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial entity */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial period */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document (e.g., invoice date) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES financial_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_documents_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES financial_entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial document */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., Document Date, Amount) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_metadata_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES financial_documents ("document_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity financial data being audited */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was taken */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES entity_financial_data ("data_id")
)
